sql:
SELECT  
            AL.TICKET_ID
            , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA
            , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA
            , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ
            , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ
            , TPD.SELF_PROCESS_GROUP
            , TPD.SELF_PROCESS_TYPE
        FROM    rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL
        LEFT JOIN nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl TPD ON TPD.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID
         WHERE (  AL.TICKET_ID = 'NTT_SIMULATION' )
